data.body: Filed bug 5e40-0fe4-a966-425e (chordal-quasilegal-pipit): plan-review gate non-convergent re-review of already-signed plan at drifted HEAD emits invalid blocking findings. Documents each invalid finding (epic A1 snapshot false-positive re-raised verbatim + self-contradicting w/ its own advisory; S1 remediation-induced blocks; operator-runbook-granularity findings; already-litigated rebase:chain; contentless P6 findings) with triggering criteria, round progression, and the review-stage (discovery/validation/impact) that should have caught each. Root cause #7: hard-override from closed story 0858 (epic 4cc3) force-escalates mis-validated 'AC-unverifiable' findings to 0.85 blocking — validation mis-tagging is the upstream defect. Linked discovered_from f1fa + relates_to 4cc3.
